snippet.description:
Today I had to find every food in roblox. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: KAGURABACHI｜Official Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
KAGURABACHI set for TV Anime Adaptation by Cypic in April 2027!

Official Website: https://anime.kagurabachi.jp/en/
Official X: https://x.com/kb_anime_jp
Official TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@kb_anime_jp

[Introduction]
A single stroke opens a new era, cutting a path from Japan to the world—
Weekly Shonen Jump's Neo-Japanese Sword Action series begins here!

From day one, the Kagurabachi manga has captivated fans, weaving a blood-soaked tale of revenge through breathtaking sword-fight sequences.

And now, known for its uncompromising quality, animation studio Cypic brings the story to life with jaw-dropping visuals!

[Story]
Flames of resolve, kindled by hatred.

Chihiro Rokuhira is a boy who aspires to become a swordsmith, and took daily training under his father Kunishige, a renowned swordsmith. Their days, once filled with laughter, are brutally torn apart by an attack from the mysterious sorcerer organization, the Hishaku.

What is stolen from them are the six Enchanted Blades—swords of immense power capable of shaping the fate of the nation—and the gentle, warm life they once shared.

From that day on, everything changed. In a world engulfed in darkness, Chihiro takes up Enten, the seventh Enchanted Blade left behind by his father, and sets out on a blood-soaked path of revenge.

[Staff]

A single stroke opens a new era, cutting a path from Japan to the world—
Weekly Shonen Jump's Neo-Japanese Sword Action series begins here!

And now, known for its uncompromising quality, animation studio Cypic brings the story to life with jaw-dropping visuals!

[Story]
Flames of resolve, kindled by hatred.

Chihiro Rokuhira is a boy who aspires to become a swordsmith, and took daily training under his father Kunishige, a renowned swordsmith. Their days, once filled with laughter, are brutally torn apart by an attack from the mysterious sorcerer organization, the Hishaku.

What is stolen from them are the six Enchanted Blades—swords of immense power capable of shaping the fate of the nation—and the gentle, warm life they once shared.

From that day on, everything changed. In a world engulfed in darkness, Chihiro takes up Enten, the seventh Enchanted Blade left behind by his father, and sets out on a blood-soaked path of revenge.

snippet.title: Impossible Game Vs The Spiffing Brit - Max Difficulty Might And Magic IS A PERFECTLY BALANCED GAME
snippet.description:
Pro Exploiting British Man VS An Impossible game! Who Will win??
Take your personal data back with Incogni! Use code SPIFFINGBRIT at the link below and get 60% off an annual plan: https://incogni.com/spiffingbrit

Welcome To Heroes Of Might And Magic Olden Era! A brand new turn based strategy game and the spiritual successor to the classic style of strategy in HOMM 3 and HOMM 5. Whilst technically Ubisoft has attempted to make more recent heroes games they are a little DIFFERENT! Anyway I sank a LOT of hours into the HOM&M Olden era demo in the steam next fest and ended up finding some bugs, glitches, exploits and overpowered mechanics that I think it is best to warn the developers about before their new game releases in a few days time! The game has already collected over 1.5 million wishlists so I reckon some of you will have a lot of fun messing about with these overpowered things when the game eventually releases. 

I am not sponsored but if you want to checkout the game and maybe grab it in a steam sale then take a look here: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3105440/Heroes_of_Might_and_Magic_Olden_Era/

snippet.title: Aphelion - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
snippet.description:
APHELION is out now on PS5:  https://store.playstation.com/concept/10007223/

Aphelion is a cinematic third-person action-adventure set on the planet Persephone, an uncharted, frozen world. Stranded and isolated, you must survive the truly unknown, find each other, and complete the mission. Traverse stunning alien landscapes, avoid lurking threats, and discover the haunting secrets buried beneath the ice.  

A game in collaboration with ESA, the European Space Agency. 

#ps5 #ps5games #aphelion

snippet.title: "The British King is Here!" - parody of "The British Grenadiers" about King Charles's US state visit
snippet.description:
King Charles arrived just a few hours ago on a diplomatic mission that has been ludicrously overegged, given the track record of the man he is visiting. So here's our adaptation of a classic British Army marching song (that developed in the seventeenth century and became a staple in the eighteenth - including in the colonies and the Revolutionary War that saw the USA declare its independence). The British Grenadiers is a rousing tune - for many still a regimental quick march - and often a feature of the Trooping the Colour ceremony. Before people wring their hands at adapting it, it's been a recurring theme throughout its history - including notoriously by Joseph Warren (his was called "Free America") in 1774, just before the War of Independence began. We kept to some archaic language to give it the right feel, and had a stab at our own arrangement for who had instruments at home - though a hasty one, on a school night. There are references in there to scrofula, a recent UK ambassador and we removed powwow but kept kowtow after checking about usage and implications - but apologies if any offence caused. We're thinking about recording a few like this in the run-up to the 250th anniversary, so this is a kind of test case :)

___________________________

PHYSICAL: CDs or LPs: https://themarshfamily.bandcamp.com/album/hollow-chapters

- https://open.spotify.com/artist/6AYmbCwi92V29y69lkRkRa 

___________________________ 

LYRICS: 
Some talk of Alexander, and some of Hercules
But neither great commander faced such adversities
For of all the world’s state bureaus, to Trump he must repair
Can he end a row with a raised eyebrow? Oh the British King is here!

Those heroes of antiquity ne’er faced such trials withal
First cancer then Prince Andrew – now this neanderthal
Bu-t our brave Charlie’s go-ing, his balls big as his ears
He will not kowtow cos he’s too highbrow, oh the British King is here!

Whene’er he hears a slander, he’ll form a stiff blockade
He’ll rally for poor Starmer, and subjects serenade
He’ll compliment new ba-llrooms, though ghastly their veneer
All smile and bow to the sacred cow, oh the British King is here!

A feat of acrobatics this great encounter shows
A king who’s democratic meets knave in Emperor’s clothes
No host was e’er so monstrous or caused such grief and fear
Don’t disavow - who’s the despot now? Not the British King that’s clear!
  
And when the visit’s over, a triumph they’ll declare
The press will cry “Hurrah, boys: all damage is repaired”
The royal touch has cured disease, a miracle’s appeared
And they’ll be wrong, like with Mandelson, cos a bent wheel can’t be steered

snippet.title: Loathe - Revenant (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Revenant ft. NOWHERE2RUN by Loathe

Stream/Listen here: https://bfan.link/loathe-revenant

Taken from the new album 'A Stranger To You', out July 17th, 2026.

Pre-order 'A Stranger To You' here: https://bfan.link/a-stranger-to-you

This burning, scarred 
Revenant called ‘My Best’
Says “no faking…
…the sick have never been sicker” 
Do you accept the invitation? 
Burying your head in the sky
You split so close to the sun
Bodies transform
Others they’re done
Chasing - these lines that i’ve drawn, my patience is 
Thinning - i’m falling apart as the world stares 
Grinning - passed my own thoughts I can’t see
A stranger to you - familiar to me
Caged with this for so long
Step into my strength again 
I feel that cold rush
With intent to kill 
You killed yourself
I was once too raw 
Stronger now.
My blood run through all
While my bodies passed around 
The voices were deafening
It’s all much quieter now 
Malevolent patience

snippet.title: Lord of Mysteries Specials | Official Trailer | Crunchyroll
snippet.description:
Lord of Mysteries Special: City of Silver and Lord of Mysteries Special: The Marked Hunt are coming to Crunchyroll June 20th! Watch Lord of Mysteries on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-lompv

CITY OF SILVER
Above the undying gray fog, Klein Moretti, the enigmatic The Fool, presided over the Tarot Club when a new, distant prayer echoed through the mists. Reaching across the veil, he summoned Derrick Berg from the City of Silver—a cursed bastion trapped within the Forsaken Land of God. Through Derrick’s haunting tales, the grim history of this sunless city was unveiled. Seeking salvation for his people, Derrick pledged his soul to The Fool’s grace. From the twenty-two Major Arcana, he chose his mantle: "The Sun."

THE MARKED HUNT
The gathering then turned to matters of blood and ambition. "The Hanged Man," Alger Wilson, proposed a high-stakes exchange. He sought the head of Qilangos, one of the infamous seven Pirate Admirals, and tasked "Justice," Audrey Hall, with leveraging her noble influence in Backlund to hunt the wind-blessed killer.

In the foggy streets of the Loen capital, Audrey’s quest led her to the Beyonder duo, Fors Wall and Xio Derecha. As the web tightened around the Admiral, Klein sought the intervention of his mentor, the mysterious Mr. Azik. By weaving together the threads of divinity, ancient power, and mortal cunning, The Fool ensured the Tarot Club’s first great triumph: the fall of Qilangos.

snippet.title: MIRROR《ATTENTION 》Official Music Video
snippet.description:
在資訊超載的時代，「專注力」是比「流量」更貴的資產。
這份歌詞旨在呼籲聽眾過濾噪音，打破演算法的餵養，將 attention 留給真正愛的人與事。

拒絕無效消息，不理會雜音；若對世界照單全收，只會迷失自我。
同時以自信的態度表示：「我專注做我的事；懂我的人，請專注看著我。」

Rap 部分以「掃毒軟件」為邏輯，用歌詞掃描並清理聽眾大腦中的資訊病毒（distractions）。

snippet.title: Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed — Official Teaser "The Scam" | Apple TV
snippet.description:
Blackmail, secrets, and a mother of a mystery. Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed premieres May 20 on Apple TV https://apple.co/_MaximumPleasureGuaranteed

Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed follows newly divorced mom Paula (Tatiana Maslany) as she falls down a dangerous rabbit hole of blackmail, murder and youth soccer. Convinced she witnessed a crime — while simultaneously struggling through a custody battle and an identity crisis — Paula begins her own investigation, one that could unravel a greater conspiracy while also holding the keys to rebuilding her family and sense of self.

snippet.title: Helldivers 2 Patch Notes - Patch 6.2.2
snippet.description:
🛠 Support incoming!⚙️ 
*** INCOMING MESSAGE FROM SUPER EARTH HIGH COMMAND ***
The beauty of our most Democratic galaxy is truly unparalleled. As we push into new
territories, we have discovered planets with lush, tranquil forests with winding paths
and shade from massive trees.

Underneath the peaceful tree canopies, our Citizens can take time to unwind and
reflect on the glory of Managed Democracy and the good, achieved by Super Earth's
most illustrious heroes.

However, not everything on these planets is what it seems. We have detected several
of our Un-Democratic foes on the perimeter and there have also been some alarming
signals on Gloom-infested planets--larger than the typical Terminid convoys, bearing
a striking resemblance to some of the Bile Titan signals detected in other regions.

It is time to arm yourself with the new Exo Experts Warbond* equipped with new
exosuit designs well-suited for close combat and fire-based offense. Originally
deployed to clear land for a six-star holiday resort, these suits have since been
repurposed to leave enemies with nowhere left to hide.

Stay alert, Helldivers–these forests have eyes.

snippet.title: Soul Mate | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
Two lonely souls unite and choose to spend 10 years together.
Their fates intertwine, spinning a tale of soulful love that takes them to Berlin, Seoul and Tokyo.

After inadvertently destroying the life of his best friend, Ryu Narutaki abandons everything and leaves Japan. He nearly dies at a church in a foreign land before he is saved by a Korean boxer named Hwang Johan.

Both men carry deep scars, and as their lonely souls come together, it soon becomes clear that they are soul mates. The threads of fate bind them with such suffocating tightness that they find themselves deciding to live together. They travel to Berlin, Seoul and Tokyo, experiencing unforgettable pain, suffering and, ultimately, joy. “Soul Mate” is a soulful romance between two young men that spans 10 years.

Starring: Hayato Isomura, Ok Taec-yeon, Ai Hashimoto, Koshi Mizukami, Yutaro Furutachi, Lee Jae-yi, Chihiro Kato, Ken Yasuda, Kaho Minami, Tomokazu Miura
Written and Directed by: Shunki Hashizume
Theme Song: “Our Hearts” by STUTS & butaji (ft. AiNA THE END)
Production Company: ROBOT
Production: Netflix

The Netflix Series "Soul Mate" starts streaming on Thursday, May 14, 2026, only on Netflix.
https://www.netflix.com/title/81644425

Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2S2Av3k
